description: Backfill legacy research and tx_log compatibility metadata without inventing escrow facts.
upSql: UPDATE research SET created_at = coalesce(created_at, started_at, completed_at, prepared_at, funding_expires_at, TIMESTAMPTZ '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') WHERE created_at IS NULL
UPDATE tx_log SET backend = coalesce(backend, CASE WHEN tx_status = 'mock' THEN 'mock' ELSE 'arc' END), version = coalesce(version, 0) WHERE backend IS NULL OR version IS NULL
downSql: SELECT 'manual downgrade: retain backfilled created_at/backend/version for audit safety'
